<type>file</type>
<content>
1: ---
2: title: Inline Toast
3: description: An inline copy toast component with animated feedback when copying code to clipboard.
4: ---
5: 
6: import { InlineToastPreview } from "@/registry/new-york/inline-toast-demo";
7: 
8: <ComponentPreview name="inline-toast">
9:   <InlineToastPreview />
10: </ComponentPreview>
11: 
12: ## Installation
13: 
14: If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
15: 
16: <CodeBlockCommand
17:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/inline-toast"
18:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/inline-toast"
19:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/inline-toast"
20:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/inline-toast"
21: />
22: 
23: Otherwise, use the full registry URL:
24: 
25: <CodeBlockCommand
26:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/inline-toast.json"
27:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/inline-toast.json"
28:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/inline-toast.json"
29:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/inline-toast.json"
30: />
31: 
32: ## Usage
33: 
34: After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
35: 
36: ```tsx
37: import { InlineToast } from "@/components/ui/inline-toast";
38: 
39: export function MyComponent() {
40:   return <InlineToast code="CPT8456Y9" copyDuration={2000}/>;
41: }
42: ```
43: 
44: ## Props
45: 
46: | Prop           | Type     | Default | Description                                    |
47: | -------------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
48: | `code`         | `string` | -       | The code string to display and copy            |
49: | `copyDuration` | `number` | `2000`  | Duration in ms to show the copied confirmation |

(End of file - total 49 lines)
</content>

<content>
1: ---
2: title: Editable Chip
3: description: An inline-editable chip component with animated transitions between display and edit modes.
4: ---
5: 
6: import { EditableChipPreview } from "@/registry/new-york/editable-chip-demo";
7: 
8: <ComponentPreview name="editable-chip">
9:   <EditableChipPreview />
10: </ComponentPreview>
11: 
12: ## Installation
13: 
14: If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
15: 
16: <CodeBlockCommand
17:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/editable-chip"
18:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/editable-chip"
19:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/editable-chip"
20:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/editable-chip"
21: />
22: 
23: Otherwise, use the full registry URL:
24: 
25: <CodeBlockCommand
26:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/editable-chip.json"
27:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/editable-chip.json"
28:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/editable-chip.json"
29:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/editable-chip.json"
30: />
31: 
32: ## Usage
33: 
34: After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
35: 
36: ```tsx
37: import { EditableChip } from "@/components/ui/editable-chip";
38: 
39: export function MyComponent() {
40:   return (
41:     <EditableChip
42:       defaultLabel="Watchlist"
43:       onChange={(value) => console.log(value)}
44:     />
45:   );
46: }
47: ```
48: 
49: ## Props
50: 
51: | Prop              | Type                      | Default       | Description                               |
52: | ----------------- | ------------------------- | ------------- | ----------------------------------------- |
53: | `defaultLabel`    | `string`                  | `"Watchlist"` | Initial text displayed in the chip        |
54: | `showThemeToggle` | `boolean`                 | -             | Whether to show a theme toggle (reserved) |
55: | `onChange`        | `(value: string) => void` | -             | Callback fired when the label is saved    |

(End of file - total 55 lines)
</content>

input.content:
---
title: View On Map
description: An animated map preview component that expands from a pill button into an embedded Google Map view.
---

import { ViewOnMapPreview } from "@/registry/new-york/view-on-map-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="view-on-map">
  <ViewOnMapPreview />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/view-on-map"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/view-on-map"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/view-on-map"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/view-on-map"
/>

Otherwise, use the full registry URL:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/view-on-map.json"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/view-on-map.json"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/view-on-map.json"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/view-on-map.json"
/>

## Usage

After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:

```tsx
import { ViewOnMap } from "@/components/ui/view-on-map";

export function MyComponent() {
  return (
    <ViewOnMap
      address="Boston Public Garden"
      mapImageUrl="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1526778548025-fa2f459cd5ce?q=80&w=2000&auto=format&fit=crop"
    />
  );
}
```

## Props

| Prop           | Type     | Default | Description                                      |
| -------------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `locationName` | `string` | -       | Optional location name (reserved for future use) |
| `address`      | `string` | -       | The address to display on the map                |
| `mapImageUrl`  | `string` | -       | Background image URL for the pill button         |
| `className`    | `string` | `""`    | Additional CSS classes                           |

content.text:
The pattern across this registry uses Tailwind's `zinc`/`gray` scale with `dark:` variants. Here's the mapping I'll apply:

| Hardcoded | Replacement |
|---|---|
| `bg-[#E5E4EE]` | `bg-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-800` |
| `bg-[#DEDEDE]` | `bg-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-900` |
| `bg-[#E5E5E7]` | `bg-zinc-100 dark:bg-zinc-800` |
| `text-[#6A6973]` | `text-zinc-500 dark:text-white/60` |
| `text-[#3D3C43]` | `text-zinc-800 dark:text-white` |
| `text-[#85848B]` | `text-zinc-500 dark:text-zinc-400` |
| `bg-[#2A2A2D]` | `dark:bg-zinc-800` |
| `bg-[#3A3A3D]` | `dark:hover:bg-zinc-700` |

input.newString: className="relative aspect-square w-[calc(100vw-64px)] overflow-hidden bg-zinc-200 shadow-lg transition-colors duration-300 sm:w-[380px] dark:bg-zinc-900"

content.text:
All clean. Replaced all hardcoded hex colors with Tailwind's `zinc`/`gray` scale + `dark:` variants:

- `bg-[#E5E4EE]` / `bg-[#1C1C1E]` → `bg-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-800`
- `bg-[#DEDEDE]` / `bg-[#141414]` → `bg-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-900`
- `bg-[#E5E5E7]` → `bg-zinc-100 dark:bg-zinc-800`
- `text-[#6A6973]` → `text-zinc-500`
- `text-[#3D3C43]` → `text-zinc-800`
- `text-[#85848B]` → `text-zinc-500 dark:text-zinc-400`
- `bg-[#2A2A2D]` → `dark:bg-zinc-800`
- `bg-[#3A3A3D]` → `dark:hover:bg-zinc-700`

`pnpm fix` passes cleanly.
